positive: A whimsical and stylized illustration of a celestial forest scene. The composition is highly symmetrical and centered, featuring giant glowing bioluminescent mushrooms, intertwined roots, and delicate crystalline flora. A stylized, ethereal fox with glowing tail tufts sits amongst the roots, looking majestic. The color palette is dominated by deep sapphire blues, vibrant teal, iridescent purples, and pops of neon yellow-green light. The artwork must have thick, clean linework and sharp contrast against a slightly darker background, suitable for a modern apparel print design. Cinematic, dreamy, highly detailed ink wash mixed with vector illustration style.
negative: blur, artifacts, text, watermark, logo, signature, extra limbs, bad anatomy, noisy, low detail, messy lines, gradients, photo, realism, muted colors
